title: Barcelona Bound
excerpt: Barcelona is hands down one of my favorite cities in the entire world. So there was little doubt when I was contacted by Kits de Somni (kds) with an opportunity to teach there in May, that I would happily say…
body:
Barcelona is hands down one of my favorite cities in the entire world. So there was little doubt when I was contacted by Kits de Somni (kds) with an opportunity to teach there in May, that I would happily say yes.

The event will be held May 18 & 19 in what looks to be a gorgeous venue. It's months away but I am already excited to be teaching with Loredana. Hope we get to meet some of you amazing ladies in Spain! More information can be found here.
